mission: Fix tool Layer never-mismatch — 82 TS2345 errors + 6 Schema.Literal + read-lib/read-source + app-runtime

framework_change.description: Add R generic to Def interface and propagate through type chain

exact_changes.change: Add R=never: Def<Parameters extends Schema.Decoder<unknown> = Schema.Decoder<unknown>, M extends Metadata = Metadata, R = never>
exact_changes.execute_change: execute(args: Schema.Schema.Type<Parameters>, ctx: Context): Effect.Effect<ExecuteResult<M>, never, R>

exact_changes.change: Add R=never: DefWithoutID<Parameters, M, R = never> = Omit<Def<Parameters, M, R>, 'id'>
Add R=never: Init<Parameters, M, R = never> = DefWithoutID<Parameters, M, R> | (() => Effect<DefWithoutID<Parameters, M, R>>)
Add R=never: Info<Parameters, M, R = never> { id: string; init: () => Effect<DefWithoutID<Parameters, M, R>> }

Add R2=never: define<Parameters, Result, R, R2 = never, ID extends string>(id, init: Effect<Init<Parameters, Result, R2>, never, R>): Effect<Info<Parameters, Result, R2>, never, R | R2 | Truncate.Service | Agent.Service> & { id: ID }
Add R=never: wrap<Parameters, Result, R = never>(id, init: Init<Parameters, Result, R>, truncate, agents)
Add R=never: init<P, M, R = never>(def: DefWithoutID<P, M, R>, ctx: Context<M>): Effect<Info<P, M>, never, ...>

schema_literal_fixes.description: Replace Schema.Literal(a,b,c) with Schema.Literals([a,b,c]) in 6 files

app_runtime_fix.change: const rt = ManagedRuntime.make(AppLayer as never, { memoMap })

read_source_ts_fix.description: Fix 7 unknown→string type safety errors at lines 316-334
read_source_ts_fix.change: Cast JSON.parse entries explicitly: 'as Record<string, unknown>' → properly typed accesses

read_lib_ts_fix.description: Fix 5 errors — Effect.fnUntraced generator issue + missing fs methods
read_lib_ts_fix.change: May need: change from Effect.fnUntraced to Effect.gen, or add explicit type annotations

dirty_file_preservation.note: 19 tool files are dirty. All edits must be additive. Never remove unrelated code.
dirty_file_preservation.strategy: Search_replace for exact literal pattern only, no reformatting

verification.primary: cd packages/opencode && bun typecheck 2>&1 | grep -c 'error TS2345'
verification.full: cd packages/opencode && bun typecheck 2>&1 | grep -c 'error TS'
